name: Ixalan

draft.notes: If a foil appears it displaces a common. Common foils 1 in every 8 packs. A double-faced card can replace the rare and always comes with a checklist instead of a land; DFCs have the same rarity as other rares per MaRo. Land slot may be a basic land or checklist.

statedRates: Common foils 1 in 8 packs. DFCs share normal rare rarity (each rare 2/141, each mythic 1/141).
sourceNotes: Large set. 10 double-faced cards, four basic land variations. 36 packs per box. Printed in USA and Belgium.
